description: Targeted test data for the 3 failing questions + noise

entries.content: Busy day at Brightwell Capital today. The innovation day presentation went great - my boss loved it. I've been working at Brightwell for about a year now and it's been intense but rewarding. The team is solid even though they ramble too much in meetings.

Casey and I went shopping yesterday. I got her diamond earrings as a surprise gift. She looked at them and laughed - she said I should have gotten myself AirPods Max instead of buying her earrings. Typical Casey, always thinking about me. I love that about her.
Had a random conversation with the guys about types. I admitted that besides Casey, I've always been attracted to Asian girls. The guys laughed but it's true. Casey knows about it and doesn't mind.
Working on LifePath again tonight. The MVP is coming together. I spent about 3 hours after work coding the main flow. It's agentic now which makes it way more interesting.
Went to the gym today, hit a new PR on bench press. Then grabbed lunch with Arjun from work. We talked about the cloud migration project at Brightwell Capital.
Casey's sister Tara called - her new boyfriend Eli is coming to the family dinner next week. Should be interesting. Casey is excited to meet him.
Jamie came over and literally just played video games for 5 hours straight while eating Doritos and pizza. I love the guy but it drives me crazy. Get up and do something with your life.
Played Catan with Casey last night. She destroyed me as usual. We had a great time though. I'm thinking about proposing at the end of the year. Need to start planning.

questions.q: What did the user's partner say about the diamond earrings?
questions.a: She said he should have gotten himself AirPods Max instead

questions.q: What kind of girls is the user attracted to besides their partner?
What project is the user working on?
Who is Jamie and what annoys the user about him?
questions.a: Jamie plays video games all day and eats junk food

questions.q: What board game did the user play?
